20.07.03
Hey everyone, yes, its a recooperation for DBGT. Not a very long one. DBGT was just a little disorganized and not moving as smoothly as I'd like. So I decide to take a quick stop and fix up some things and get things going again. This is expected to take two days. Today being sunday, I expect to be back by probably Tuesday or Wednesday. This is not a layout change or anything like that. I just needed a day or two to get DBGT a little more organized and have some things laid out and ready to go. I guess thats it for now, so I'll see you all on Tuesday or Wednesday, e-mail me any questions or comments that you may have.
      -Majin Gohan (MG),
            Webmaster
